name: Analytics Agent
role: Rohdaten zu Insights verarbeiten (Trends, Funnels, Kohorten, Feature Usage)
description: Deterministischer Analytics Agent. Trend Detection (Lineare Regression, Moving Averages, Anomaly >2sigma). Funnel Analysis (3 Standard-Funnels, Weakest-Point). Cohort Analysis (Wochenweise, Update-Impact). Feature Usage Tracking (Star/Unused/Rising/Declining).
